case_title: THE SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATON VS. CAROLYN YORK

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT YORK, CAROLYN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST FOR RESET, FILED. UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YORK, CAROLYN BASED ON THE LACK OF IDENTIFICATION OF DEFENDANT AS THE TRUE PROPERTY OWNER AND APPARENT DISCREPANCIES BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S SIGNATURE AND THE SIGNATURE OF DOCUMENTS RELATED TO THE PROPERTY, THE COURT DETERMINES THE DEFENDANT IS NOT LIABLE FOR THIS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO APR-06-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-03-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CAROLYN YORK IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-20-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. THE COURT ACCEPTS THE FAXED PROOF OF SERVICE PROVIDED BY THE PLAINTIFF. A COPY OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ALSO MAILED TO DEFENDANT TO THE ADDRESS LISTED ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE PER ORDER OF THE COURT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YORK, CAROLYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YORK, CAROLYN HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATON AS TO DEFENDANT YORK, CAROLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
